privileged_info_summary: The DHIS2 Sierra Leone demo database contains verified ANC data elements including 'ANC 1st visit' (uid: fbfJHSPpUQD) and 'ANC 4th or more visits' (not just 'ANC 4th visit'). Sierra Leone has 14 districts configured in DHIS2 across 1332 total organisation units. The database was recently updated (January 8, 2026) and contains 2023 data. DHIS2 pivot tables support quarterly period analysis. The task requires creating a pivot table comparing ANC 1st and 4th visit attendance by district and quarter for 2023, exporting data, and analyzing coverage gaps.
